message: Ashwagandha may add to sedative effects. Avoid casual mixing with sleep aids or sedatives.
why: Sedation can stack, which matters for falls, driving, and next-day impairment.
what_to_ask: Ask whether the combination could increase drowsiness or impair coordination.

message: Lithium levels can be affected by hydration, sodium balance, kidney function, diarrhoea, or vomiting. Check with clinician.
why: GI upset or dehydration can change lithium handling and raise toxicity risk.
what_to_ask: Ask whether the full plan needs lithium level or kidney monitoring.

message: Products with neuropsychiatric uncertainty deserve extra caution if there is a mood disorder or psychosis history.
why: Sleep formulas can still affect arousal, mood stability, or agitation in sensitive users.
what_to_ask: Ask whether the product is appropriate with your psychiatric history and current medications.

message: Some herbal products can matter around surgery or blood thinner use.
why: Perioperative bleeding or anaesthesia concerns can be missed if herbal products are not disclosed.
what_to_ask: Ask the surgical team how long before surgery the product should be stopped.
